pi_items.source: task.json specification - user-defined name for this configuration task
iDempiere wiki (Import Business Partner Window ID-172, X_I_BPartner API docs) confirms I_BPartner is the Business Partner import staging table
export_result.sh comment on line 29 states 'FormatType C = Comma Separated', consistent with task description requiring 'Comma Separated' format
iDempiere API documentation confirms 'Value' field exists in I_BPartner (search key); SchemaSpy database schema shows 'value' column in c_bpartner table
task.json specifies 'String' as the data type; iDempiere documentation does not provide enumerated list of valid datatype values for AD_ImpFormat_Row.datatype column
iDempiere API documentation and SchemaSpy confirm 'Name' field exists in I_BPartner and c_bpartner tables
task.json specifies 'String'; iDempiere documentation does not enumerate valid AD_ImpFormat_Row.datatype values
Multiple iDempiere sources confirm TaxID is a standard column in Business Partner tables (C_BPartner, I_BPartner); X_C_BPartner API shows COLUMNNAME_TaxID
task.json specifies 'String'; iDempiere documentation does not enumerate valid AD_ImpFormat_Row.datatype values
iDempiere I_BPartner import table documentation and SchemaSpy confirm 'Description' field exists in Business Partner tables
task.json specifies 'String'; iDempiere documentation does not enumerate valid AD_ImpFormat_Row.datatype values

privileged_info_summary: This task configures an Import Format in iDempiere for Business Partner data migration. The I_BPartner table is the verified staging table used for Business Partner imports in iDempiere. The four field mappings (Value/search key, Name, TaxID, and Description) are all standard columns in the Business Partner schema. The format type 'C' for Comma Separated is consistent with task requirements. All column names and sequence numbers are correct for standard iDempiere Business Partner import operations. The data type designation 'String' for all four fields cannot be verified against external documentation as iDempiere documentation does not enumerate the specific valid values for the AD_ImpFormat_Row datatype field, though the fields themselves are correctly identified as text-based columns in the schema.
